zh.lifeSummary: 當Lydia Hartshorn於1602年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾帕德波利時，她的父親John Hartshorn20歲，母親Ann Bignell15歲。她於1620年與James Buck在英國英格蘭結婚。她去世於1667年4月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lydia Hartshorn于1602年1月1日出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾帕德波利时，她的父亲John Hartshorn20岁，母亲Ann Bignell15岁。她于1620年与James Buck在英国英格兰结婚。她去世于1667年4月19日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可辛加姆享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hartshorn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hartshorne (Derbyshire), from Old English heort ‘hart, stag’ (genitive heortes) + horn ‘horn’, perhaps in reference to the nearby hill (known as Hart Hill) and its supposed resemblance to a hart's horn. Alternatively, the name may be topographic, from Middle English harteshorn ‘swine cress’, for someone who lived at or near an area where swine cress grew.

variants.name: Hartshorne
meanings: English (Staffordshire and Shropshire): variant of   Hartshorn  .

nameMeanings.name: Lydia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Greek origin, meaning ‘woman from Lydia’, an area of Asia Minor. The name is borne in the Bible by a woman of Thyatira who was converted by St Paul and who entertained him in her house (Acts 16:14–15, 40). It has enjoyed steady popularity in the English-speaking world since the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lydia Hartshorn was born on 1 January 1602, in Padbury, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Hartshorn, was 20 and her mother, Ann Bignell, was 15. She married James Buck in 1620, in England, United Kingdom. She died on 19 April 1667, in Hingham, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

ko.lifeSummary: Lydia Hartshorn(이)가 1602년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 파드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hartshorn(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Bignell(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1620년 영국 잉글랜드에서 James Buck(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1667년 4월 19일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 잉함에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lydia Hartshorn родилась 1 января 1602 г. в местности падбури, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Hartshorn было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Bignell, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Buck в 1620 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Она умерла 19 апреля 1667 г. в местности хингхам, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.
